name: Fli — Flight Search MCP Server
what_it_does: Fli MCP server enabling AI agents to search for flights — querying Google Flights data for available flights between airports, retrieving fare prices and schedules, finding cheapest travel dates, and integrating flight search into agent-driven travel planning and booking research workflows.
use_cases: Searching for flights between airports from travel planning agents
Finding cheapest fares and travel dates from budget travel agents
Retrieving flight schedules and durations from itinerary planning agents
Comparing airline prices for route options from trip optimization agents
Building travel itineraries with flight data from assistant agents
Monitoring fare changes for travel alerts from travel monitoring agents
not_for: Booking flights (search/data only; no booking capability)
Hotel, car rental, or other travel bookings
Teams needing professional travel API with SLA (use Amadeus or Sabre)
best_when: An agent needs to search for and compare flights — for travel planning assistance, itinerary generation, or fare research with Google Flights data.
avoid_when: You need to book flights, require production-grade travel API, or need hotel/rental car data alongside flights.

auth.notes: No authentication required — scrapes Google Flights data. No API key needed. Google's terms of service apply to automated access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — scrapes publicly available Google Flights data
pricing.notes: Free and open source. Uses Google Flights data via scraping — no official Google API. Reliability depends on Google Flights page structure remaining stable.

performance.rate_limits: Google Flights informal rate limits — avoid high-frequency requests

known_agent_gotchas: Google Flights scraping is fragile — may break when Google updates page structure
Google may block automated requests — CAPTCHA or IP blocking risk
Prices displayed may not be bookable — always verify on actual booking site
Airport codes must be IATA format (JFK, LAX, LHR)
Community MCP — individual project, may not be actively maintained
Flight data is for research/planning only — not for production travel systems
agent_readiness.security_notes: Scrapes public Google data. No credentials needed. Community MCP. Respect Google ToS. Flight prices are informational — verify before booking decisions.

security_score_components.security_notes: Scrapes public data. No credentials. Community MCP. Respect Google ToS.
